sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after RIGHT action
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

# Build hash maps
before_map = {}
for n in before['nodes']:
    before_map[(n['hash'], n['color'])] = n
after_map = {}
for n in after['nodes']:
    after_map[(n['hash'], n['color'])] = n

# Find differences
for key in set(list(before_map.keys()) + list(after_map.keys())):
    if key not in before_map:
        print("New in after:", key)
    elif key not in after_map:
        print("Missing in after:", key)
    else:
        bn = before_map[key]
        an = after_map[key]
        if bn['boundary'] != an['boundary']:
            print("Moved:", key, bn['boundary'], an['boundary'])
</parameter>
